productDisplayName: Timberland Men Light Brown Casual Shoes
description: Blending plush two-tone suede with rustic leather, these ankle boots from timberland are designed for comfort under extreme conditions. The high top styling with stitch seams at the toe box is a sartorial reference to the spirit of adventure. Wear these with form fitting denims and a dark formal shirt.UpperHigh-top nubuck upper with strategically placed overlaysBrand embossing on the lateral side of the heelCentral lace ups with metal ringsPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe box MidsoleRubber midsole for cushioningOutsoleTPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction and a stacked heelshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a nubuck brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
